output_debit_classifier.reason: This is a straightforward service revenue transaction. Atlas Van Lines has completed the performance obligation by providing office relocation services to the customer. Under IFRS 15, revenue is recognized when control of the service is transferred to the customer (i.e., when the service is performed). The $31,500 is billed on credit with payment due in 10 days, creating an accounts receivable asset. No tax is mentioned in the transaction, so no tax lines are included. The entry balances with $31,500 debited to Accounts Receivable and $31,500 credited to Service Revenue.
